title: Cosimo I de' Medici
highlights:
de' Medici (12 June 1519 – 21 April 1574) was the second and last duke of Florence from 1537 until 1569, when he became the first grand duke of Tuscany, a title he held until his death. Cosimo I succeeded his cousin to the duchy. He built the Uffizi(office) to organize his administration, and conquered Siena to consolidate Florence's rule in Tuscany.
